steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “thick curtain of long, coily hair that...engulfs her” signals that the hair is so voluminous it nearly covers the girl completely.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Practically” means almost. This word expresses the extent to which the hair engulfs her rather than certainty or emotion.

The other three either contradict the sense (never), misidentify emotional tone (cheerfully), or misplace doubt (doubtfully).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
